quote: Hope is not a wish for things to get better. It’s the belief that things will get better.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
linkName: Sermon “Hope Is A Thing With Feathers” — Jul 2019
socialPost:
Hope breathes life into our journey, reminding us that belief is the first step towards transformation. Let us nurture that belief and embrace the future with open hearts.

#Hope #Faith #Resilience #Inspiration
